name: marta-mcp
description: Real-time Atlanta MARTA rail arrivals and bus positions
long_description: Exposes Atlanta MARTA transit data as MCP tools: real-time train arrival predictions for all rail stations (RED/GOLD/BLUE/GREEN lines) and live bus vehicle positions and trip updates from MARTA's GTFS-realtime feeds. Rail data requires a free MARTA API key, read from ~/.marta/config.json or the MARTA_API_KEY environment variable.

api_key.title: MARTA API Key
api_key.description: Optional. Leave blank if your key is stored in ~/.marta/config.json (recommended). Register at https://www.itsmarta.com/developer-reg-rtt.aspx
